referrals.title: Referrals
referrals.subtitle: Invite friends and earn rewards when they join Sindbad.Tech.

rewards.title: Rewards Structure
rewards.durationDesc: Earn for up to 3 months per referral
rewards.noLimitDesc: Refer as many people as you want

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Copy your unique referral link and share it with friends, family, or your network.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Your friend registers on Sindbad.Tech using your referral link and subscribes to a plan.
howItWorks.step3Desc: You receive 10% of their subscription fee for up to 3 months. Your friend gets a welcome bonus.

table.title: My Referrals
table.name: Name
table.emptyDesc: Share your referral link above and start earning when friends sign up.
